description: Dashboard for GCP Compute Engine overview
title: GCP Compute Engine Overview

widgets.description:
Current CPU utilization represented as a percentage of the reserved CPU that is currently in use.
It can shot up above 100% for certain workloads

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: % CPU Utilization

widgets.description: Percentage of total system memory actively in use.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: % Memory Utilization

widgets.description: Memory usage by each memory state, in Bytes. Applied to only Container-Optimised OS.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Memory Used in Bytes

widgets.description: Percentage of total system memory actively in use. Collected by Ops Agent.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance' AND state = 'used'

widgets.title: % Memory Utilization via Ops Agent

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.description: Whether the disk performance is normal or could potentially be impacted by an issue within Compute Engine. One of ["Healthy", "Degraded" or "Severely Degraded"].

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Disk performance status

widgets.description: Count of incoming packets dropped by the firewall.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Dropped packets

widgets.description: Elapsed time since the VM was started, in seconds.

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Uptime total

widgets.description: Rate of disk data being read

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Disk Read Throughput

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'
project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'
project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'
project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'
project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.description: Rate at which network packets are sent out

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Sent packets

widgets.description: Rate at which network packets are received

filter.expression: project_id = $project_id AND instance_id in $instance_id AND gcp.resource_type = 'gce_instance'

widgets.title: Received packets
